# draw

```go
import "image/draw"
```

Package draw provides image composition functions.

See "The Go image/draw package" for an introduction to this package: https://golang.org/doc/articles/image_draw.html

## Index

- [func Draw\(dst Image, r image.Rectangle, src image.Image, sp image.Point, op Op\)](<#Draw>)
- [func DrawMask\(dst Image, r image.Rectangle, src image.Image, sp image.Point, mask image.Image, mp image.Point, op Op\)](<#DrawMask>)
- [type Drawer](<#Drawer>)
- [type Image](<#Image>)
- [type Op](<#Op>)

<a name="Draw"></a>

## func [Draw](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L110>)

```go
func Draw(dst Image, r image.Rectangle, src image.Image, sp image.Point, op Op)
```

Draw calls [DrawMask](<#DrawMask>) with a nil mask.

<a name="DrawMask"></a>

## func [DrawMask](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L116>)

```go
func DrawMask(dst Image, r image.Rectangle, src image.Image, sp image.Point, mask image.Image, mp image.Point, op Op)
```

DrawMask aligns r.Min in dst with sp in src and mp in mask and then replaces the rectangle r in dst with the result of a Porter\-Duff composition. A nil mask is treated as opaque.

<a name="Drawer"></a>

## type [Drawer](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L60-L64>)

Drawer contains the [Draw](<#Draw>) method.

```go
type Drawer interface {
    // Draw aligns r.Min in dst with sp in src and then replaces the
    // rectangle r in dst with the result of drawing src on dst.
    Draw(dst Image, r image.Rectangle, src image.Image, sp image.Point)
}
```

<a name="FloydSteinberg"></a>FloydSteinberg is a [Drawer](<#Drawer>) that is the [Src](<#Over>) [Op](<#Op>) with Floyd\-Steinberg error diffusion.

```go
var FloydSteinberg Drawer = floydSteinberg{}
```

<details><summary>Example (Floyd Steinberg)</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"image"
	"image/color"
	"image/draw"
	"math"
)

func main() {
	const width = 130
	const height = 50

	im := image.NewGray(image.Rectangle{Max: image.Point{X: width, Y: height}})
	for x := 0; x < width; x++ {
		for y := 0; y < height; y++ {
			dist := math.Sqrt(math.Pow(float64(x-width/2), 2)/3+math.Pow(float64(y-height/2), 2)) / (height / 1.5) * 255
			var gray uint8
			if dist > 255 {
				gray = 255
			} else {
				gray = uint8(dist)
			}
			im.SetGray(x, y, color.Gray{Y: 255 - gray})
		}
	}
	pi := image.NewPaletted(im.Bounds(), []color.Color{
		color.Gray{Y: 255},
		color.Gray{Y: 160},
		color.Gray{Y: 70},
		color.Gray{Y: 35},
		color.Gray{Y: 0},
	})

	draw.FloydSteinberg.Draw(pi, im.Bounds(), im, image.Point{})
	shade := []string{" ", "░", "▒", "▓", "█"}
	for i, p := range pi.Pix {
		fmt.Print(shade[p])
		if (i+1)%width == 0 {
			fmt.Print("\n")
		}
	}
}
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="Image"></a>

## type [Image](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L21-L24>)

Image is an image.Image with a Set method to change a single pixel.

```go
type Image interface {
    image.Image
    Set(x, y int, c color.Color)
}
```

<a name="Op"></a>

## type [Op](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L44>)

Op is a Porter\-Duff compositing operator.

```go
type Op int
```

<a name="Over"></a>

```go
const (
    // Over specifies ``(src in mask) over dst''.
    Over Op  = iota
    // Src specifies ``src in mask''.
    Src
)
```

<a name="Op.Draw"></a>

### func \(Op\) [Draw](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L55>)

```go
func (op Op) Draw(dst Image, r image.Rectangle, src image.Image, sp image.Point)
```

Draw implements the [Drawer](<#Drawer>) interface by calling the Draw function with this [Op](<#Op>).

<a name="Quantizer"></a>

## type [Quantizer](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L37-L41>)

Quantizer produces a palette for an image.

```go
type Quantizer interface {
    // Quantize appends up to cap(p) - len(p) colors to p and returns the
    // updated palette suitable for converting m to a paletted image.
    Quantize(p color.Palette, m image.Image) color.Palette
}
```

<a name="RGBA64Image"></a>

## type [RGBA64Image](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/image/draw/draw.go#L30-L34>)

RGBA64Image extends both the [Image](<#Image>) and [image.RGBA64Image](<https://pkg.go.dev/image/#RGBA64Image>) interfaces with a SetRGBA64 method to change a single pixel. SetRGBA64 is equivalent to calling Set, but it can avoid allocations from converting concrete color types to the \[color.Color\] interface type.

```go
type RGBA64Image interface {
    image.RGBA64Image
    Set(x, y int, c color.Color)
    SetRGBA64(x, y int, c color.RGBA64)
}
```
